descriptions.accessKey: Enter your tenant identifier to access the system
descriptions.localProtection: Add a local password to lock the application after inactivity. This step remains optional.

fields.localPasswordHint: It will be required to unlock the application on this device.

messages.workspaceConnectedDefault: Your tenant workspace is now ready in Fluxo.
messages.accessKeyRequiredDescription: Paste the company key generated after subscription approval.
messages.localLockEnabledDescription: This device will now ask for your local password after inactivity.
messages.localKeyRemovedDescription: The local tenant session has been removed from this device.

validation.localPasswordMinLength: Use at least 4 characters for the local password.
validation.localPasswordMismatch: Local password confirmation does not match.

trust.connected: Secure connection - Isolated tenant - Security audit
trust.localProtection: Optional local protection - Automatic lock - Data always masked

backend.unavailable: The Fluxo server is currently unavailable. A new attempt will be made in 10 seconds.
backend.waitingTitle: Waiting for the Fluxo server connection...
backend.waitingDescription: The backend is not reachable yet. Fluxo will retry automatically every 10 seconds.
backend.checkingDescription: Fluxo is validating the company key stored on this device.

errors.missingSession: The API did not return an access session.
